name: Flowise
short_desc: Drag-and-drop builder for LLM apps and AI agents (LangChain-based).
author: FlowiseAI
description: Flowise is an open-source low-code tool to build customized LLM orchestration flows and AI agents. Visually chain LLMs, tools, memory and vector stores, then expose them as APIs. Data is persisted to the app data directory.
